# EIDL Loan in Bankruptcy -- Discharge Guide [2026]
> Can you discharge an SBA EIDL loan in bankruptcy? Personal guarantees, Chapter 7 vs 13 strategies, and what happens to your collateral. Free 2026 guide.

## About
eidlbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- EIDL in Chapter 11 -- Small Business Reorganization: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/eidl-chapter-11.html
- EIDL Loans in Chapter 13 -- Structured Repayment: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/eidl-chapter-13.html
- EIDL Loans in Chapter 7 -- Discharge and Fresh Start: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/eidl-chapter-7.html
- EIDL Dischargeability -- What You Need to Know: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/eidl-dischargeability.html
- EIDL Loan in Bankruptcy -- Discharge Guide: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/
- SBA Offer in Compromise -- Settling for Less: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/offer-in-compromise.html
- EIDL Personal Guarantee -- Your Exposure and Options: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/personal-guarantee.html
- SBA Collections Process -- What to Expect After Default: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/sba-collections.html
- Small Business Bankruptcy Options -- For EIDL Borrowers: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/small-business-options.html
- Timing Your EIDL Bankruptcy Filing -- Strategic Considerations: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/timing-your-filing.html
- EIDL Advance (Grant) in Bankruptcy -- Do You Have to Pay It Back? (2026): https://eidlbankruptcy.com/eidl-advance-bankruptcy.html
- EIDL vs PPP in Bankruptcy -- Key Differences for Filing (2026): https://eidlbankruptcy.com/eidl-vs-ppp-bankruptcy.html
- EIDL Bankruptcy FAQ -- SBA Loan Discharge Questions: https://eidlbankruptcy.com/frequently-asked-questions.html
